slice.description: Vue 3 CDN + Element Plus Dashboard SPA — 7 pages with full API integration
acceptanceCriteria: dashboard/index.html exists as standalone Vue 3 CDN SPA
Includes 7 pages: Dashboard, Events, Issues, Alerts, Performance, Audit Logs, Settings
Uses Vue 3 + Element Plus + Chart.js + Day.js from CDN
All API calls use fetch with error handling
Collector serves dashboard as static files at /
